Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Dreadnought City]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — Dreadnought City is a location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Dreadnought City is a location mentioned in comparison to skin color.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — Dreadnought City is being besieged by the Silent King's drones.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Dreadnought City is home to three Chief Guardians.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon faced three Archlords in the skies above Dreadnought City.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Dreadnought City has ruined streets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Dreadnought City was being evacuated.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Dreadnought City sends foreign emissaries.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — Dreadnought City is located in Everwood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Northstrider mentions having dream tablets from Dreadnought City.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
